mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, question_text, user_answer, score, comment, sort_order FROM report_comment WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_report (session_id, user_id, total_score, level, technical_score, expression_score, logic_score, completeness_score, innovation_score, suggestion) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{totalScore}, #{level}, #{technicalScore}, #{expressionScore}, #{logicScore}, #{completenessScore}, #{innovationScore}, #{suggestion})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.session_id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.level, r.technical_score, r.expression_score, r.logic_score, r.completeness_score, r.innovation_score, r.suggestion, r.created_at, s.position, s.round, s.difficulty FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.id AS sessionId, r.total_score AS score, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.technical_score AS technical, r.expression_score AS expression, r.logic_score AS logic, r.completeness_score AS completeness, r.innovation_score AS innovation FROM interview_report r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInterviews, IFNULL(AVG(total_score), 0) AS avgScore, IFNULL(MAX(total_score), 0) AS highestScore, IFNULL(AVG(technical_score), 0) AS avgTechnical, IFNULL(AVG(expression_score), 0) AS avgExpression, IFNULL(AVG(logic_score), 0) AS avgLogic, IFNULL(AVG(completeness_score), 0) AS avgCompleteness, IFNULL(AVG(innovation_score), 0) AS avgInnovation FROM interview_report WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.user_id AS userId, MAX(r.total_score) AS bestScore FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE s.position = #{position} GROUP BY r.user_id ORDER BY bestScore DESC

SELECT r.user_id AS userId, MAX(r.total_score) AS bestScore FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE s.position = #{position} AND s.round = #{round} GROUP BY r.user_id ORDER BY bestScore DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_comment rc INNER JOIN interview_report ir ON rc.report_id = ir.id WHERE ir.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.id AS sessionId, r.total_score AS score, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.technical_score AS technical, r.expression_score AS expression, r.logic_score AS logic, r.completeness_score AS completeness, r.innovation_score AS innovation FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND s.position = #{position} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInterviews, IFNULL(AVG(r.total_score), 0) AS avgScore, IFNULL(MAX(r.total_score), 0) AS highestScore, IFNULL(AVG(r.technical_score), 0) AS avgTechnical, IFNULL(AVG(r.expression_score), 0) AS avgExpression, IFNULL(AVG(r.logic_score), 0) AS avgLogic, IFNULL(AVG(r.completeness_score), 0) AS avgCompleteness, IFNULL(AVG(r.innovation_score), 0) AS avgInnovation FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND s.position = #{position}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInterviews, IFNULL(AVG(r.total_score), 0) AS avgScore, IFNULL(AVG(r.technical_score), 0) AS avgTechnical, IFNULL(AVG(r.expression_score), 0) AS avgExpression, IFNULL(AVG(r.logic_score), 0) AS avgLogic, IFNULL(AVG(r.completeness_score), 0) AS avgCompleteness, IFNULL(AVG(r.innovation_score), 0) AS avgInnovation FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND s.position = #{position} AND s.round = #{round}

SELECT r.id AS sessionId, r.total_score AS score, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.technical_score AS technical, r.expression_score AS expression, r.logic_score AS logic, r.completeness_score AS completeness, r.innovation_score AS innovation FROM interview_report r INNER JOIN interview_session s ON r.session_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND s.position = #{position} AND s.round = #{round} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
